title: Ervix
content:
{{Top|leg}}
An '''ervix''' was a fierce, but extinct, animal from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Duro/Legends|Duro]].

The term "Ervix" was also a [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] surname.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-08-XX -->''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]''
